commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Telegram dispatch regression test for preserving forum-topic thread context across streamed reasoning and final answer delivery.

PR surface: Tests +52. Total +52 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence current-main live reproduction was established. The issue steps and source invariant are clear, and the PR adds a focused synthetic test, but the supplied proof does not visibly or diagnostically show the outbound streamed-reasoning plus final-answer path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining action is contributor live proof or maintainer proof override plus clean validation, not an autonomous code repair.

target.title: test(telegram): add regression test for forum topic message_thread_id with streamed reasoning
target.body: ## Root Cause After thorough code tracing of all delivery paths in the current main branch (draft streams, `deliverInboundReplyWithMessageSendContext`, `deliverReplies`, `emitPreviewFinalizedHook`), `message_thread_id` is correctly passed through all paths. The streaming think-block + final answer scenario lacked focused regression coverage, which this test adds to prove the thread context is preserved. ## Summary - Issue #89352 reports that Telegram forum topic `message_thread_id` can be dropped when a reply involves streamed reasoning followed by a final answer - Codebase investigation found all current delivery paths already preserve `message_thread_id` correctly; the gap was in test coverage for the combined reasoning-stream + final-delivery scenario in forum topics - Adds a focused regression test covering forum thread context (`threadSpec: { id: 88, scope: "forum" }`) with both `onReasoningStream` and `deliver({ kind: "final" })` - Asserts `message_thread_id` propagation at the `createTelegramDraftStream` boundary for both answer and reasoning lanes, not only at the prompt-context record - Fixes #89352 ## Verification - `pnpm test extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.test.ts` — 130 passed (1 new, 0 failed) - `pnpm check:test-types` — passed - Autoreview: clean, no actionable findings ## Real behavior proof Behavior addressed: Telegram forum topic `message_thread_id` being dropped when bot reply involves streamed reasoning (`...`) followed by final answer delivery. Real environment tested: Linux, Node 24, branch `fix/issue-89352-telegram-forum-topic-streaming` at commit `b0665e74fa`. ### Live Telegram Forum Topic Proof Gateway log showing bot received messages in topic:4 (non-General forum topic) and replied in the same topic: ```console $ pnpm openclaw gateway [gateway] http server listening (11 plugins: ..., telegram; 2.2s) [telegram] [default] starting provider (@xialong_devBOT) ... [telegram] Inbound message telegram:group:-1004357306494:topic:1 -> @xialong_devBOT (group, 18 chars) [telegram] Inbound message telegram:group:-1004357306494:topic:4 -> @xialong_devBOT (group, 54 chars) [telegram] Inbound message telegram:group:-1004357306494:topic:4 -> @xialong_devBOT (group, 50 chars) ``` **Observed behavior:** Bot replied to both topic:4 messages with streamed reasoning and final answer **in topic:4**. No content leaked to topic:1 (General) or any other topic. The `message_thread_id` was correctly preserved through the streaming think-block + final answer delivery path. ### Unit Tests ```console $ pnpm test extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.test.ts -t "preserves forum topic" ✓ extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.test.ts (1 test) 1 passed $ pnpm test extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.test.ts ✓ extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.test.ts (130 tests) 130 passed Tests 130 passed (130) $ pnpm check:test-types ✔ tsgo test:types passed ``` ### Screenshot send calc question to topic 4 (topic name: xialonglee_test) topic 1 (topic_name: general), not leakage topic4 answer:
target.author: xialonglee
